sample_requests: Load malaria_feature_table.csv LC-MS data with feature_id_sep='__' and run mummichog on the m/z + pvalue with 1000 permutations
Annotate LC-MS peaks against KEGG via [M+H]+ adducts at 10 ppm and sanity-check mummichog by seeding TCA-cycle compounds
Parse the brca_matrix.csv lipidomics matrix, annotate every species with parse_lipid + annotate_lipids, and run LION enrichment
Aggregate a lipidomics AnnData to class-level totals with aggregate_by_class(agg='sum')
Decide between mummichog_basic and mummichog_external for a multi-DB pathway enrichment run
Run species-level differential on a lipidomics matrix and feed the padj<0.10 hits into lion_enrichment

validation_budget.skip_reason: Source-grounded via inspect.signature / inspect.getdoc and direct reads of omicverse/metabol/{_lipidomics,_mummichog,_fetchers,io}.py; no live smoke harness. The mummichog synthetic-TCA recovery cell from the tutorial is documented in reference.md as the closest stand-in for a smoke check.
